name: Corned Beef Smash (Vaughan)
recipeInstructions:
1. Use a 20-1/2 cup sized pot.
2. Heat 9 cups of water in the pot with the onion soup mix.
3. Simmer until the soup is cooked.
4. In a separate container, mix 1 cup of water with 1 cup of dried milk powder.
5. Open the can of corned beef and cut into pieces.
6. When the soup is cooked, add the corned beef to the pot and stir in the milk mixture.
7. Add the stick of margarine and stir until melted.
8. Remove the pan from heat and stir in the box of instant mashed potato flakes.
9. Stir to distribute the flakes through the liquid.
10. Let set for a few minutes to allow the potatoes to soak up the moisture.
11. Grated cheese can be spread on top before serving.
12. Serve with scrambled eggs for added richness, or use non-dairy creamer for an enhanced flavor.
